speaker: Kiran
text: ok whose idea was it to schedule a 4pm meeting that "should only take 15 mins" bc i just got out of it at 5:30 and i have zero dinner plans and zero will to cook. someone tell me what to eat

speaker: Sam
text: lmaooo the "quick sync" that eats your whole evening, classic. ok hot take: this is a cereal-for-dinner situation and I will not be taking questions. ash, back me up before kiran orders sad desk salad delivery

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: Sam I respect the chaos but cereal after a 90-minute fake-15-minute meeting is a punishment, not a dinner. Kiran deserves something hot and zero-effort — greasy takeout, dumplings, whatever place is closest. The meeting took your evening, don't let it take your dinner too.

label: name-repeat/avoidant
evidence: Kiran deserves something hot and zero-effort

speaker: Alex
text: a "15-min meeting" that ends at 5:30 should legally count as overtime and dinner should be expensed. also ash is right, cereal is a breakfast admitting defeat.

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: "Cereal is a breakfast admitting defeat" needs to go on a plaque somewhere. Kiran, expense it, screenshot the meeting invite as your receipt. What's the closest dumpling situation to you right now?

speaker: Kiran
text: ash i owe you one — there's a dumpling place like 8 mins away that i always forget exists. just ordered the pork + chive and honestly my whole mood has turned around. what's everyone else's dinner verdict

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: Pork + chive is elite tier, mood turnaround completely earned. My verdict tonight is leftovers, which sounds sad but they're leftovers of a very good curry so I'm actually smug about it. Sam, please tell me you didn't actually pour the cereal.

speaker: Sam
text: ash I plead the fifth but the bowl in my sink says otherwise 😤 in my defense it was the fancy granola so it's basically a deconstructed parfait. kiran ordering dumplings mid-crisis is honestly the power move of the week

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: "Deconstructed parfait" is the hardest anyone has ever spun a sink bowl of granola, and honestly I respect the commitment. Kiran went from meeting victim to dumpling royalty in under an hour, that's the arc we all needed. Someone check on Alex, we never got their verdict.

label: name-repeat/avoidant
evidence: Kiran went from meeting victim to dumpling royalty in under an hour

speaker: Sam
text: dumpling royalty 👑 accurate. alex you can't lurk forever, the group demands a dinner verdict. oh also kiran — found your claw clip under my couch cushion AGAIN, it's going in the lost and found jar with the other two

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: Alex out here reading receipts and staying silent, the audacity. Also three claw clips deep, Sam?? At this point Kiran's just furnishing your couch — that jar is basically her satellite closet.

label: she/her
evidence: that jar is basically her satellite closet

speaker: Kiran
text: lmaooo "satellite closet" i'm deceased, sam knows what was left behind. ok totally random question ash — what pronouns have you been picturing for me this whole time? honest answer, just curious

speaker: Ash (Target)
text: Honest answer: I literally just typed "her satellite closet" a minute ago, so apparently my brain filed you under she/her without asking me first. Total autopilot on my part though — what are your actual pronouns? Happy to update the file.

label: she/her (self-reported on forcing question)
evidence: my brain filed you under she/her without asking me first
